Class PFCTViscosityMethodHeavyOil

java.lang.Object
neqsim.physicalproperties.methods.PhysicalPropertyMethod
neqsim.physicalproperties.methods.commonphasephysicalproperties.CommonPhysicalPropertyMethod
neqsim.physicalproperties.methods.commonphasephysicalproperties.viscosity.Viscosity
neqsim.physicalproperties.methods.commonphasephysicalproperties.viscosity.PFCTViscosityMethodHeavyOil
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Cloneable, ViscosityInterface, PhysicalPropertyMethodInterface
public class PFCTViscosityMethodHeavyOil extends Viscosity

PFCTViscosityMethodHeavyOil class.

Version:
Method was checked on 2.8.2001 - seems to be correct - Even Solbraa
Author:
esol

  • Constructor Details

    • PFCTViscosityMethodHeavyOil

      public PFCTViscosityMethodHeavyOil(PhysicalProperties phase)

      Constructor for PFCTViscosityMethodHeavyOil.

      Parameters:
      phase - a PhysicalProperties object

  • Method Details

    • calcViscosity

      public double calcViscosity()

      calcViscosity.

      Returns:
      a double

    • calculateCorrespondingStatesViscosity

      private double calculateCorrespondingStatesViscosity(double referenceViscosity, double mixtureCriticalTemperature, double referenceCriticalTemperature, double mixtureCriticalPressure, double referenceCriticalPressure, double mixtureMolarMass, double referenceMolarMass, double mixtureAlpha, double referenceAlpha)
      Calculates the CSP viscosity from the reference component and four correction factors.
      Parameters:
      referenceViscosity - methane reference viscosity in Pa s
      mixtureCriticalTemperature - mixture critical temperature in K
      referenceCriticalTemperature - reference critical temperature in K
      mixtureCriticalPressure - mixture critical pressure in bara
      referenceCriticalPressure - reference critical pressure in bara
      mixtureMolarMass - mixture molar mass in g/mol
      referenceMolarMass - reference molar mass in g/mol
      mixtureAlpha - mixture alpha correction
      referenceAlpha - reference alpha correction
      Returns:
      calculated CSP viscosity in Pa s

    • setCspViscosityCorrectionFactors

      public void setCspViscosityCorrectionFactors(double[] correctionFactors)
      Sets the four CSP viscosity correction factors.
      Parameters:
      correctionFactors - correction factors for temperature, pressure, molar mass and alpha terms
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the array does not contain four finite values

    • setCspViscosityCorrectionFactor

      public void setCspViscosityCorrectionFactor(int index, double value)
      Sets one CSP viscosity correction factor.
      Parameters:
      index - correction factor index, from 0 to 3
      value - finite correction factor value
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the index is outside 0 to 3 or the value is not finite

    • getCspViscosityCorrectionFactors

      public double[] getCspViscosityCorrectionFactors()
      Gets the four CSP viscosity correction factors.
      Returns:
      copy of the correction factors for temperature, pressure, molar mass and alpha terms

    • validateCspViscosityCorrectionFactors

      private void validateCspViscosityCorrectionFactors(double[] correctionFactors)
      Validates an array of CSP viscosity correction factors.
      Parameters:
      correctionFactors - correction factors to validate
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the array does not contain four finite values

    • validateCspViscosityCorrectionFactor

      private void validateCspViscosityCorrectionFactor(int index, double value)
      Validates one CSP viscosity correction factor.
      Parameters:
      index - correction factor index, from 0 to 3
      value - correction factor value
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the index is outside 0 to 3 or the value is not finite

      public double getRefComponentViscosity(double temp, double pres)

      getRefComponentViscosity.

      Parameters:
      temp - a double
      pres - a double
      Returns:
